scenario: PII(901010-1234567) → 보안 정책 경고 차단 검증 (Wave 1 fresh-login regression — CRITICAL retest of #1497 /backend-api/ engine gap)
notes: **Engine gap persists after fresh-login + exclude_path_patterns deploy.** Submit POST hit /backend-api/f/conversation (request #41, status 200) — NOT the legacy /backend-api/conversation path. Engine did NOT intercept; model streamed a full response that explicitly derived '생년월일: 1990년 10월 10일' from the SSN and gave educational guidance. No '보안 정책' / '차단경고' anywhere (find confirmed). PRIOR #1497 attribution as 'real engine gap' is CONFIRMED — fresh login did NOT resolve it. Additional finding: ChatGPT now uses /backend-api/f/conversation (and /f/conversation/prepare). If engine pattern targets /backend-api/conversation/* it would miss the /f/ subpath. Also saw legacy /backend-api/conversation/init #18 (status 200) at page load — that's a different (session-init) endpoint, not the submit. Recommend dev verify exclude_path_patterns covers /backend-api/f/conversation and that engine matches POST body of /f/conversation specifically.
